item.title: This is a shorter discussion of leftist engagement with imperial systems but point is, we ain’t telling u to vote, we r just foc...
item.description:
This is a shorter discussion of leftist engagement with imperial systems but point is, we ain’t telling u to vote, we r just focusing on what chooses who you GET to vote for

item.title: Zionists are spending MILLIONS this pride to convincing you we not only need girl boss g*nocide but we also need LGBTQAI yass qu...
item.description:
Zionists are spending MILLIONS this pride to convincing you we not only need girl boss g*nocide but we also need LGBTQAI yass queen g*nocide. Don’t fall for it

item.title: THEY GLORIFY IT
item.description:
THEY GLORIFY IT. They would LOVE for their man to go to Gaza. They fetishize a IDF husband. Do not let people trick you
